title: Block Retaining Wall Design as Per NZGS Module 6
description: Block Retaining Wall Design as Per NZGS Module 6

H_w.description: Height of Wall, H_w. Symbol: H_w. Units: mm

L_stem.description: Thickness of wall stem, L_stem. Symbol: L_{stem}. Units: mm

L_toe.description: Length of toe, L_toe. Symbol: L_{toe}. Units: mm

L_heel.description: Length of heel, L_heel. Symbol: L_{heel}. Units: mm

L_base.description: Thickness of base, L_base. Symbol: L_{base}. Units: mm

L_key.description: Height of shear key, L_key. Symbol: L_{key}. Units: mm

β_deg.description: Slope of Backwall, β. Symbol: β_{deg}. Units: °

i.description: Slope of Backfill, i. Symbol: i. Units: °

Ø_b.description: Soil Friction Angle, Backfill, Ø_b. Symbol: Ø_b. Units: °

Øn_deg.description: Soil Friction Angle, Native, Ø_n. Symbol: Øn_deg. Units: °

K_p.description: Passive earth pressure as per NZTA BM Figure 4.2. Symbol: K_p

S_u.description: Soil Undrained Shear Strength, Native, S_u. Symbol: S_u. Units: kPa

c_a.description: Sliding resistance, c_a. Symbol: c_a. Units: kPa

γ_b.description: Soil Unit Weight, Backfill, γ_b. Symbol: γ_b. Units: kN/m^3

γ_n.description: Soil Unit Weight, Native, γ_n. Symbol: γ_n. Units: kN/m^3

γ_c.description: Concrete Unit Weight. Symbol: γ_n. Units: kN/m^3

w_g.description: Unfactored G load surcharge. Symbol: w_g. Units: kPa

w_q.description: Unfactored Q load surcharge. Symbol: w_g. Units: kPa

q_u.description: ULS Bearing capacity of soil, q_u. Symbol: q_u. Units: kPa

a_max.description: Maximum acceleration, a_max. Symbol: a_{max}. Units: g

w_d.description: Wall Displacement Factor, w_d. Symbol: w_d

wd link.description: See Table 5.2 of Module 6 for Situations and Values

a_topo.description: Topographic Amplification factor, a_topo. Symbol: a_{topo}

Φ_bc.description: Resistance factor for bearing capacity, Φ_bc. Symbol: Φ_{bc}

Φ_sl.description: Resistance factor for sliding, gravity case, Φ_sl. Symbol: Φ_{sl}

Φ_p.description: Resistance factor for passive pressure, Φ_p. Symbol: Φ_{p}

Φ_eq.description: Resistance factor for bearing and sliding EQ case, Φ_eq. Symbol: Φ_{eq}

α_G_stab.description: Factor for Self weight, stabilising, α_G_stab. Symbol: α_{G_stab}

α_G_destab.description: Factor for Self weight, de-stabilising, α_G_destab. Symbol: α_{G_destab}

αep_s.description: Factor for Earth Pressure Gravity Case, αep_s. Symbol: αep_s

αep_eq.description: Factor for Earth Pressure EQ Case, αep_eq. Symbol: αep_{eq}

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
